text:
MODE EVANGELION is a mook published by Gakken Plus on 16 November 2012. It is a collaboration with the female brand mmts and Evangelion. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4056068380 

Overview

It includes information on the Evangelion goods collaborated with each brand, information on fashion items, and film projects that look back on Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone and Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance in a correlation diagram. On the cover, a collaboration between Shokotanko and Shoko Nakagawa and Rei Ayanami!

Including within the packsge were a tote bag with a Spear of Longinus pattern, a Mari Meets mmts badge, Evangelion temporary tattoo chart, which was collaborated with the popular fashion brand mmts. https://www.eva-info.jp/595
